SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.caching

Class CachingData

java.lang.Object
ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.caching.CachingData
All Implemented Interfaces:
PermissionsData
Direct Known Subclasses:
CachingGroupData, CachingUserData
public abstract class CachingData extends Object implements PermissionsData
Data backend implementing a simple cache
